pi_items.source: setup_task.sh:12 - ensure_mailbox_exists creates mailbox with this exact name
setup_task.sh:12 - ensure_mailbox_exists creates mailbox with this exact email address
export_result.sh:24 checks for SavedReplyCategory with name='Billing'; verifier.py:26 uses metadata.get('target_category', 'Billing'); task description specifies 'Billing'
setup_task.sh:26 and 46 - creates SavedReply with name='Refund Template'; task description specifies 'Refund Template'
verifier.py:27 uses metadata.get('target_reply_name', 'Standard Refund'); task description specifies 'Standard Refund' as target rename

privileged_info_summary: This task operates on synthetic data created by setup_task.sh within a FreeScout help desk system. The mailbox 'Customer Support' (support@helpdesk.local) is created during task initialization, along with a saved reply named 'Refund Template'. The task objective is to create a new category named 'Billing', move the existing 'Refund Template' reply into this category, and rename it to 'Standard Refund'. All metadata values correctly correspond to the values actually created by the setup scripts and expected by the verifier.
